creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text: I undid my hack to restrict steal_idle to the current CCX, but left the thresh=2 override in place.I saw the usual lang/ghc SIGBUS, and lang/go died with its common malloc state corruption issue.  java/openjdk7 failed with the compiler temp file rename issue.  Disappointingly, clang died with a SIGSEGV when building www/webkit-gtk3.
